findings.location: s4 (ワークフロー（ステートマシン）の現在の状態を取得する)
findings.description: The source contains a diagram (`images/status.png`) under the 「定義」subsection. Sections s1, s2, and s3 all include their corresponding images, but s4 omits `![状態定義例](assets/workflow-doc--s14/status.png)` inconsistently.

findings.location: s6 hints (XORゲートウェイの進行先ノードの判定方法)
findings.description: `SequenceFlow` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the method signature of `isMatch` in both the source and the knowledge file's code example, but is absent from the hints array for s6.
findings.source_evidence: public boolean isMatch(String instanceId, Map<String, ?> param, SequenceFlow sequenceFlow)

findings.location: s7 hints (マルチインスタンスの完了条件の判定方法)
findings.description: `Task` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the method signatures of `isCompletedUserTask` and `isCompletedGroupTask` in both the source and the knowledge file's code example, but is absent from the hints array for s7.
